methodology.limitation: True follower scraping requires Apify API key or Instagram login. This prototype demonstrates the pipeline structure using simulated competitor clusters.
methodology.productionUpgrade: Replace competitorClusters + localInfluencers with real Apify follower data

signals: Key player in austin dental cluster

dmSequence.dm1: Hey there! 👋 I run Customer Comeback Machine — we help dental businesses in Austin keep their regulars coming back. Quick question — do you use any automated system for client follow-ups, or is it all manual?
dmSequence.dm2: Hey! Following up — I built a free calculator that shows how much dental practices lose when customers don't return. Happy to share if you're curious! And totally fine if not — just say the word and I won't message again. 🙌
dmSequence.complianceNote: MAX 2 DMs. If no reply, STOP. If they say no, log opt-out immediately.
